validation_cycles.overview: The DevOps Agent performs self-validation before writing plan/devops.md. All validation checks must pass before the artifact is considered complete.

criteria.criterion: Build, test, and deploy stages are defined.
Environment list is complete (dev, staging, prod, etc.).
Purpose of each environment is documented.

check.name: rollback_plan
check.description: Rollback strategy is defined for deployments.

criteria.criterion: RTO or recovery expectation is stated.
Metrics, logs, and/or traces are planned.
Secrets storage approach is documented (vault, env, etc.).
No secrets in code or plaintext config.

check.name: backup_dr_plan
check.description: Backup and disaster recovery are planned.

criteria.criterion: DR approach is documented (or explicitly deferred with rationale).

validation_flow.step: Run all self-validation checks after environment_planning phase.
If any check fails, iterate on the design before writing.
Do not write plan/devops.md until all checks pass.
Report validation status to the user upon completion.
